Cup Nooble — Sprout Lands Basic Asset Pack
Source: https://cupnooble.itch.io/sprout-lands-asset-pack
License terms: see read_me.txt in this directory (the file shipped with the pack).

Summary (binding terms in read_me.txt):
- You may modify the assets.
- Non-commercial projects only. NFT / AI-training uses are not allowed.
- The asset pack itself may not be redistributed or resold, even if modified.
  Open-source projects that include the assets must include a credit note
  ("Some assets by Cup Nooble") together with these licensing terms — that
  is what this LICENSE.txt + the parent project's README.md provide.
- Credit required: Cup Nooble. (See README.md "License" section.)

Pulled: 2026-05-08
Pack version: Basic pack (free), 299 kB, 60 files across Characters/Objects/
              Tilesets/Sprout Lands color pallet
